description: Use this API to copy a file from one group to another group. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = scenariocopyfile(srcgroup, sfile, dstgroup)

parameters.name: srcgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group containing the file to be copied. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Name of the file to be copied. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: dstgroup
parameters.description: Name of the group the file will be copied to. (input; no default allowed).
